title: Ansible Language Server Settings
description: Schema for Ansible Language Server configuration settings.

ansible.ansible.useFullyQualifiedCollect.description: Toggle usage of fully qualified collection names (FQCN) when inserting module names.

ansible.python.interpreterPath.description: Path to the python/python3 executable. This setting may be used to make the extension work with ansible and ansible-lint installations in a python virtual environment.

ansible.python.activationScript.description: Path to a custom activation script, which is to be used instead of the settings above to run in a python virtual environment.

ansible.executionEnvironment.containerEn.description: Container engine to be used while running with execution environment. For 'auto', it will look for 'podman' and then for 'docker'.

ansible.executionEnvironment.enabled.description: Toggle usage of an execution environment.

ansible.executionEnvironment.image.description: Name of the execution environment to be used.

ansible.executionEnvironment.pull.policy.description: Image pull policy to be used. 'always' will always pull; 'missing' pulls if not local; 'never' never pulls; 'tag' pulls if tag is 'latest' or missing locally.

ansible.executionEnvironment.pull.argume.description: Specify any additional parameters that should be added to the pull command. e.g. '--tls-verify=false'.

ansible.executionEnvironment.containerOp.description: Extra parameters passed to the container engine command, example: '--net=host'.

ansible.completion.provideRedirectModule.description: Toggle redirected module provider when completing modules.

ansible.completion.provideModuleOptionAl.description: Toggle alias provider when completing module options.

ansible.validation.enabled.description: Toggle validation provider. If enabled and ansible-lint is disabled, validation falls back to ansible-playbook --syntax-check.

ansible.validation.lint.arguments.description: Optional command line arguments to be appended to ansible-lint invocation.

src.description: The name of the local volume or path to be mounted within execution environment.

dest.description: The path where the file or directory are mounted in the container.

options.description: Optional comma-separated list of options, such as ro,Z.
